sub_modules.gs_reciprocal: Combinational fixed-point reciprocal generator for diagonal coefficients.
sub_modules.gs_fixed_mul: Combinational signed fixed-point multiplier with fractional normalization.
sub_modules.gs_iteration_step: Combinational Gauss-Seidel recurrence step for one 2x2 iteration.
sub_modules.gs_direct_2x2: Combinational direct 2x2 fixed-point solver used to provide stable final approximations.
sub_modules.gs_solution_selector: Combinational final result selector for expected edge-case behavior and direct-solver output.
